intro: Squirrels in your Gravesend attic or walls? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Gravesend, Brooklyn, protecting your home from these persistent rodents. Our experienced technicians use humane trapping methods and permanent exclusion techniques to solve your squirrel problems quickly and effectively.
whyUs: We've been serving Gravesend residents for years with specialized knowledge of the unique pest challenges in this Brooklyn neighborhood. Our licensed technicians provide fast response times, humane removal methods, and guaranteed results with transparent pricing from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of your infestation.
localContext: Gravesend's mix of single-family homes near Avenue U and multi-family buildings around Kings Highway often experience squirrel activity, especially during fall and winter months. The mature trees lining residential streets and proximity to green spaces make Gravesend properties particularly attractive to squirrels seeking warm shelter in attics, soffits, and wall voids.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Gravesend?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Gravesend typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the extent of the infestation, number of entry points, and necessary repairs. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, ensuring transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Gravesend home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in your attic or walls, especially during early morning or evening hours, chewed wood or wires, squirrel droppings in the attic, and visible entry holes on your roof or soffits. You may also notice squirrels entering and exiting your roofline during daylight hours.

faqs.question: Are squirrels dangerous to my Gravesend property?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels can cause significant damage by chewing through electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), damaging insulation, gnawing on wood structures, and creating entry points that allow other pests inside. They can also carry parasites and their droppings may pose health risks, making prompt removal essential.

faqs.question: How long does squirrel removal take in Gravesend homes?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Gravesend take 3-7 days for trapping and removal, followed by exclusion work to seal entry points. The complete process including repairs and prevention typically takes 1-2 weeks depending on the extent of damage and the number of squirrels present. We work efficiently to restore your home quickly.
